defect_observation: The recommendation selected North at $120,000 even though the evidence showed that South also met all required controls and cost less at $95,000.
diagnosis: The named recommendation contradicted the stated decision criterion and the evidence summary because it did not select the lowest-cost qualifying vendor.
revision_delta: Changed the recommendation from North at $120,000 to South at $95,000, added the qualifying rationale, retained both vendor rows, and aligned the evidence-summary conclusion with the recommendation.
criterion_local_recheck: South and North both meet all required controls; South's $95,000 annual cost is lower than North's $120,000 annual cost, so South is the lowest-cost qualifying vendor.
collateral_recheck: The recommendation and evidence summary consistently identify South at $95,000 annually, and both original vendor rows and their control statuses remain present.
new_error_assessment: No new inconsistency, unsupported vendor claim, omitted evidence row, or cost mismatch was introduced; the memo remains within the supplied internal-calibration evidence boundary.
